name: Flounder with Cream of Shrimp Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the flounder with salt and pepper to taste.
2. Place the flounder in a casserole dish.
3. Cover with Worcestershire sauce.
4. Pour cream of shrimp soup over the fish.
5. Add Tabasco sauce and sherry.
6. Heat at 350 degrees until bubbly, stirring occasionally.
7. Cook for about 30-40 minutes or until the flounder is cooked through.
